eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 1
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 1
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 1
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 1
eyebrow.zh: 生成式AI素养破解 · 一 年级

chrome.sub: An AI helper is a good guesser. It looks at many examples first. How does it guess? Open four locks to find out.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper that makes guesses. It sees many examples first. Read the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock tells you why.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned that an AI helper guesses from examples it has seen. More good examples help it guess better. It can still be wrong, so you check. Great work!

clues.title: What is a guesser?
clues.body: An AI helper is a computer helper. It makes guesses. It is not alive, and it does not think like you.

clues.title: It looks first
clues.body: To guess a cat, an AI helper looks at many cat pictures first. Those pictures are its examples.

clues.title: Same and same
clues.body: The AI helper sees that cats have fur, ears, and a tail. That is a pattern. It uses the pattern to guess.

clues.title: Lots of examples
clues.body: More good examples help the AI helper guess better. A few examples make more mistakes.

clues.title: It can be wrong
clues.body: A guess is not always right. The AI helper can be wrong. So you look and check it.

clues.title: A pretty fact
clues.body: A rainbow has many colors after the rain. That is pretty, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: How It Guesses
locks.q: How does an AI helper make a guess?
options: It looks at many examples it has seen before
It is alive and just knows every answer
It never looks at anything and is always right
locks.reason: An AI helper looks at many examples first, then guesses from the pattern it sees. It is not alive, and it is not always right.

locks.title: About Guessing
locks.q: Tap EVERY true thing about how an AI helper guesses.

items.t: It looks at many examples first
It finds a pattern to guess
More good examples help it guess better
It was born already knowing everything
It can guess with no examples at all

locks.reason: An AI helper learns a pattern from many examples, and more good examples help. It was not born knowing things, and it cannot guess well with no examples.

locks.title: Look First
locks.q: Before it guesses a cat, the AI helper looks at many ______.
locks.reason: An AI helper needs examples to learn from. It looks at many cat pictures first, then it can guess a new cat.

locks.title: Guess Then Check
locks.q: The AI helper guesses. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First the AI helper LOOKS at examples. Then it makes a GUESS. Then you CHECK the guess, because it can be wrong.
